name: agent_runtime
summary: Code-first agents and validated Python callable tools.
documentation:
Code-first agents and validated Python callable tools.

## API Reference

### Agent
Type: class
Source: agent.py
Signature: class Agent

Provider-neutral, bounded, synchronous model/tool loop.

### AgentConfig
Type: class
Source: models.py
Signature: class AgentConfig

Execution limits and generation settings for an Agent.

### AgentResult
Type: class
Source: models.py
Signature: class AgentResult

Structured result of a completed agent run.

### AgentTool
Type: class
Source: models.py
Signature: class AgentTool(Protocol)

Structural interface accepted by Agent for model-callable tools.

### FunctionTool
Type: class
Source: tools.py
Signature: class FunctionTool

Validated model tool backed by an explicitly supplied Python callable.

### ToolExecution
Type: class
Source: models.py
Signature: class ToolExecution

One local tool execution performed during an agent run.

### tool
Type: function
Source: tools.py
Signature: tool(function: Callable[..., Any] | None = None, *, name: str | None = None, description: str | None = None) -> Callable[..., Any]

Attach optional model-tool metadata to a callable.

### AgentError
Type: class
Source: models.py
Signature: class AgentError(RuntimeError)

Base error raised by the workspace agent runtime.

### AgentMaxTurnsError
Type: class
Source: models.py
Signature: class AgentMaxTurnsError(AgentError)

Raised when an agent exhausts its configured model-turn budget.

### ToolDefinitionError
Type: class
Source: models.py
Signature: class ToolDefinitionError(AgentError)

Raised when a Python callable cannot be exposed safely as a tool.
